What&#8217;s the difference between cate: What’s the difference between Àwọn ẹ̀ka and tags? Normally, tags are ad-hoc keywords that identify important information in your post (names, subjects, etc) that may or may not recur in other posts, while Àwọn ẹ̀ka are pre-determined sections. If you think of your site like a book, the Àwọn ẹ̀ka are like the Table of Contents and the tags are like the terms in the index.
